no: MiH Fixpack also includes a Spacewarp spell, no need to repeat Assassinations Complete the quests in this mod to become an Athkatlan assassin!Install Assassinations before Xan BG2 and Mazzy Megamod.
sum: BG2 quest mod about assassination contracts. Short quest chain with stealth-oriented encounters.

co.n: Assassinations mod for Baldur's Gate II
